title: nginx-ui RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-33032 allows full nginx server takeover, with no patch available. Exploitation has been reported in the wild. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild. (confidence: 0.90)

primary.title: Actively Exploited nginx-ui Flaw (CVE-2026-33032) Enables Full Nginx Server Takeover

title: e-shot form builder plugin vuln
